2026-06-02FINFinancial Administration Act
Canada Deposit Insurance Corporation ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Deposit Insurance CorporationApproval of the re-appointment by the Minister of Finance of J. Martin Castonguay of Hudson, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Deposit Insurance Corporation, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective June 22, 2026.N/A
act:
Financial Administration Act
Canada Deposit Insurance Corporation Act
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Deposit Insurance Corporation
precis: Approval of the re-appointment by the Minister of Finance of J. Martin Castonguay of Hudson, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canada Deposit Insurance Corporation, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective June 22, 2026.
